- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] GitHub workflow or automation
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Validation scripts

- [ ] List structure or categories

## Validation

List the checks you ran, or explain why no local validation was needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR does not unintentionally change generated files.
